title: Optimised Prime + New Adventures
description: This is an extended version of Minecraft it aims to enhance everything Minecraft isnt already good at for a better vanilla+ experience
body:
![Now with more Explosions!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/91877b7d56ba569fceb642e89ccddaf019e611bb.jpeg)

## For the ones seeking more conntent in minecraft while keeping the original minecraft feel!

Just a lot of details!


have fun ^^/
___
if your the owner of any of these mods and dont want them to be used or would like attribution please write me.

There is NO focus on multiplayer at this time

keep in mind that this modpack is very much still in work in progress and is probably gonna change A LOT.
